certificate.issued_by: Guardian Agent — Agentic Zero Pioneer Team

gaps: No AI-specific risk assessment, impact assessment or objective-setting processes defined
Missing mechanisms for performance monitoring, continual improvement and internal audit of the AI system
No provisions for transparency, explainability or human oversight documentation beyond basic escalation rules
Absence of competence, training and accountability structures for personnel managing the AI agent
recommendations: Implement formal AI risk and impact assessment procedures covering GxP, GDPR and dangerous goods scenarios
Define measurable AI performance metrics, logging requirements and periodic review cycles
Establish documented roles, escalation paths and training programs aligned with ISO/IEC 42001 clauses 5-10

issues: Personal data detected: define lawful basis for processing
Data minimization: ensure only necessary data is processed
Retention policy: define how long data is retained

certificate.notes: Guardian review completed. Risk level: high. Quality: 100%

remediation_plan: ISO 42001: No AI-specific risk assessment, impact assessment or objective-setting processes defined
GDPR: Personal data detected: define lawful basis for processing
